name: uinaf/skill-audit
summary: Audit existing skills with Tessl scoring, metadata and trigger-coverage checks, repo conventions, and skill-authoring best practices. Use when creating or revising a skill, triaging weak self-activation, or comparing a skill against source-repo guidance such as `AGENTS.md`, `CLAUDE.md`, or repo rules, plus external skill guidance. Do not use to verify general application code or to rewrite unrelated docs.
